top_critical.title: Oracle PeopleSoft Zero-Day CVE-2026-35273 Exploited
top_critical.summary: The ShinyHunters threat group exploited a zero-day vulnerability (CVE-2026-35273) in Oracle PeopleSoft to breach enterprise systems and steal data, primarily targeting universities, between 27 May and
top_critical.architects_take: Apply Oracle's patch for CVE-2026-35273 immediately and audit PeopleSoft access logs for activity between 27 May and 10 June 2026. Review network segmentation to ensure PeopleSoft instances are not directly internet-facing, and validate that data exfiltration controls such as DLP and egress monitoring are in place for systems hosting sensitive records.
